creator: lightside@safebox.ru
text:
Patch to update devel/upp port from 2008.1 to 2791 version.

- Added desktop entry for TheIDE.
- Added license configuration.
- Changed auto-generation of package list file.
- Changed include and library directories.
- Deleted hardcoded compiler name and its options from distributed Makefile (possible to use different compiler).
- Deleted MD5 hash line from distinfo file.
- Enabled MAKE_JOBS_SAFE.

Look following link for changes:
http://www.ultimatepp.org/www$uppweb$Roadmap$en-us.html

Fix: Use attached diff from /usr/ports/devel directory and delete upp/files directory.

Patch attached with submission follows:
